# @pondoknusa/http

HTTP router and middleware for Pondoknusa

## Install

```bash
npm install @pondoknusa/http
```

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Version | `2.0.0` |
| Source | [`packages/http`](https://github.com/pondoknusa/pondoknusa/tree/main/packages/http) |
| Category | Kernel & HTTP |
| Node.js | `>=26` |

From the package entry point (`dist/index.d.ts`). Deep imports are not supported.
